description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, test, install, examples and variables BUILD_DIR=cmake/build and INSTALL_PREFIX=/tmp/ocon. In the build stage add a build job that creates $BUILD_DIR, runs cmake -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=$INSTALL_PREFIX ../.., then make -j2, and stores the $BUILD_DIR directory as an artifact. In the test stage add a test job that depends on build, runs $BUILD_DIR/test/ocon_tester --gtest_output="xml:report.xml", and uploads report.xml as a JUnit artifact. In the install stage add an install job that depends on build, runs cd $BUILD_DIR and make install -j2. In the examples stage add an examples job that runs cd examples, creates $BUILD_DIR, runs cmake ../.. -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH="/usr/local;$INSTALL_PREFIX", then make, then executes bicycle/bicycle_tester and pendulum/pendulum. All jobs use the tag ocon.
